---
name: Module Contribution
about: Propose an addition or improvement to a station module
title: '[Module XX] '
labels: 'contribution'
assignees: ''
---

## Module
Which module does this relate to? (e.g., 01-structure, 05-power-systems)

## Type
- [ ] New subsystem design
- [ ] Calculation improvement
- [ ] Simulation
- [ ] Visualization
- [ ] Bug fix (physics error)
- [ ] Documentation

## Description
What are you proposing?

## Physics Basis
What physics/engineering principles does this build on? Include references.

## Calculations
Show relevant math (formulas, values, units).

## Dependencies
Does this affect other modules? Which ones?
